concepts_used.title: 蒙特卡洛模拟
concepts_used.how_used: 论文用Java编写了一个计算机模拟程序，创建了'person'和'staircase'对象，通过输入参数（如列车车厢数、车厢长度、楼梯数量等）模拟乘客从座位到街道的平均时间，属于离散事件蒙特卡洛模拟。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: To model this situation, our group developed a computer simulation of the train station in Java. We created objects for people and staircases and made a simulator that based on parameters we entered, told us the average time that it takes one person to make if from their train seat, to street level.

concepts_used.title: 中心化/归一化/标准化
concepts_used.how_used: 假设乘客在站台上的行走速度服从正态分布，均值1.3005 m/s，标准差0.1705 m/s，用于模拟个体差异。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Walking speeds on the platform determined for each person will be randomly selected from a normal distribution with mean 1.3005 and standard deviation f .1705.

concepts_used.title: 灵敏度分析
concepts_used.how_used: 通过改变楼梯数量、楼梯容量、车厢长度等参数，观察平均时间的变化，分析各因素的敏感性。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Using this data, we were able to isolate variables such as the number of train cars, car length, number of steps, staircase positioning and staircase carrying capacity and see their effects on average time.

concepts_used.title: 模型假设的写法
concepts_used.how_used: 论文列出了7条假设，包括所有乘客都有座位、楼梯上保持一步距离、车门宽度1米等，每条假设都给出了理由和引用来源。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Assumption 1: Every passenger on the train has a seat. ... Assumption 2: When walking up stairs, commuters maintain a distance of one step between each other. ...

concepts_used.title: 引言写作方法
concepts_used.how_used: 引言部分以全球经济和效率的重要性开头，引出通勤铁路优化问题，并简要介绍模型方法和主要发现。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: In today’s global economy, efficiency counts. ... Our group was tasked with optimizing a system of just this sort: commuter rail.

concepts_used.title: 常用图表类型及选择指南
concepts_used.how_used: 论文在附录中使用了图表（如Figure 4和Figure 5）来展示出口顺序和座位布局，辅助说明模型假设。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: We assume our passengers are courteous and follow the exit order given in Figure 4 of Appendix B. ... (See Figure 5 in Appendix C).

concepts_used.title: 误差度量（R²/相对误差/RMSE）
concepts_used.how_used: 以平均'seat to street'时间作为主要性能指标，通过模拟输出该指标来评估不同配置的效果。
concepts_used.source_excerpt: Using this data, we were able to isolate variables ... and see their effects on average time.
